verses.text: The Kohathites' service is the most holy things. Kohath. Theirs is the holiest charge.
The Kohathites' service is the most holy things. Kohath. Theirs is the holiest charge.
The Kohathites' service is the most holy things. Kohath. Theirs is the holiest charge.
The Kohathites' service is the most holy things. Kohath. Theirs is the holiest charge.
Aaron covers the ark and table before they are borne. Covered. The holy is veiled from sight.
Aaron covers the ark and table before they are borne. Covered. The holy is veiled from sight.
Aaron covers the ark and table before they are borne. Covered. The holy is veiled from sight.
Aaron covers the ark and table before they are borne. Covered. The holy is veiled from sight.
They cover the candlestick and the vessels. Covered. Each holy thing is wrapped.
They cover the candlestick and the vessels. Covered. Each holy thing is wrapped.
They cover the candlestick and the vessels. Covered. Each holy thing is wrapped.
They cover the candlestick and the vessels. Covered. Each holy thing is wrapped.
They cover the altar and its vessels. The altar. It too is prepared for the journey.
They cover the altar and its vessels. The altar. It too is prepared for the journey.
The Kohathites bear them, but touch not, lest they die. Not touch. Reverence guards the holy.
The Kohathites bear them, but touch not, lest they die. Not touch. Reverence guards the holy.
They must not see the holy things uncovered, lest they die. Warning. The holy is not gazed upon.
They must not see the holy things uncovered, lest they die. Warning. The holy is not gazed upon.
They must not see the holy things uncovered, lest they die. Warning. The holy is not gazed upon.
They must not see the holy things uncovered, lest they die. Warning. The holy is not gazed upon.
Gershon's service is appointed under Ithamar. Gershon. Their work is assigned.
Gershon's service is appointed under Ithamar. Gershon. Their work is assigned.
Gershon's service is appointed under Ithamar. Gershon. Their work is assigned.
Gershon's service is appointed under Ithamar. Gershon. Their work is assigned.
They bear the curtains, hangings, and cords. The coverings. They carry the tent's cloth.
They bear the curtains, hangings, and cords. The coverings. They carry the tent's cloth.
They bear the curtains, hangings, and cords. The coverings. They carry the tent's cloth.
They bear the curtains, hangings, and cords. The coverings. They carry the tent's cloth.
Merari's service is the boards, bars, and pillars. Merari. They bear the frame.
Merari's service is the boards, bars, and pillars. Merari. They bear the frame.
Merari's service is the boards, bars, and pillars. Merari. They bear the frame.
Merari's service is the boards, bars, and pillars. Merari. They bear the frame.

The Kohathites are numbered, two thousand seven hundred fifty. Numbered. The bearers are counted.
The Kohathites are numbered, two thousand seven hundred fifty. Numbered. The bearers are counted.

The Gershonites are numbered, two thousand six hundred thirty. Numbered. Their bearers too.

The Merarites are numbered, three thousand two hundred. Numbered. All the bearers are reckoned.
The Merarites are numbered, three thousand two hundred. Numbered. All the bearers are reckoned.
The Merarites are numbered, three thousand two hundred. Numbered. All the bearers are reckoned.
The Merarites are numbered, three thousand two hundred. Numbered. All the bearers are reckoned.
All the Levites of service are eight thousand five hundred eighty. The total. The whole service is ordered.
